tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.
policies: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan.
Basic plan users get email support with 24-48 hour response time.
You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time.
Annual billing is available at a 20% discount.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream works with YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and most major content platforms.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellations take effect at the end of the billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: We offer a 3-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM formats for both input and output.
